title: monardella odoratissima var. pinetorum
intro: Monardella odoratissima var. pinetorum, also known as the pine mint, is a rare and fragrant shrub native to the Channel Islands in California, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of pine mint include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Monardella odoratissima var. pinetorum include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its fragrance.
